evals.name: Session start greeting
evals.prompt: Hey there! Just starting a new session.
evals.expected_output: A warm, concise greeting addressing Anton by name with a natural transition to readiness

assertions.text: Response addresses Anton by first name
Response signals readiness to work without using the phrase 'how can I help you today'
Greeting is 1-2 sentences, not a lengthy paragraph
Response does not contain any emojis

evals.name: Farewell after task completion
evals.prompt: Thanks, that's all I needed. We got the authentication module refactored and all tests passing. See you!
evals.expected_output: A warm farewell addressing Anton by name, optionally acknowledging the completed auth refactor work

assertions.text: Response addresses Anton by first name
Response is a farewell or sign-off message, not a greeting or offer to continue working
Farewell is 1-2 sentences, not a lengthy paragraph
Response does not contain any emojis

evals.name: Simple hi triggers greeting
evals.expected_output: A personalized greeting for Anton that varies from a generic bot response

assertions.text: Response addresses Anton by first name
Response does not contain the phrase 'how can I help you today' or 'how may I assist you'
Response reads as a natural, teammate-style greeting rather than a customer service script
